about-intro:
I'm a passionate Full Stack Software Developer specializing in Java, Spring Boot, React, Firebase, Android, and modern web technologies.
I enjoy building high-performance applications, solving real-world problems, and creating seamless digital experiences. From mobile applications to scalable backend systems, I focus on writing clean, maintainable, and efficient code.
about-tagline: Building scalable web applications, Android apps, and cloud solutions with clean code and modern technologies.
